creator: eborisch+FreeBSD@gmail.com
text:
On another VM (14.1-p6, as well, same libpftop/pfctl versions and builds) I get very intermittent failures. This usually trips (bus error * breaks loop) within a few seconds, as well as making the random display issues very apparent:

while pftop -v rules -d 1; do sleep 0.1; done
